zh.Quesnay, Estrées la Campagne, Calvados,: 法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯艾斯特雷-拉-坎帕格
zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Caisneto Cheyne於大約1095年出生在英國英格蘭素可時，他的父親Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II28歲，母親Aeliz de Maminot21歲。他於1122年與Sybil Elizabeth在英國英格蘭素可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1169年在法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯艾斯特雷-拉-坎帕格享年75歲。

zh-hans.Quesnay, Estrées la Campagne, Calvados,: 法国諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯艾斯特雷-拉-坎帕格
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Caisneto Cheyne于大约1095年出生在英国英格兰素可时，他的父亲Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II28岁，母亲Aeliz de Maminot21岁。他于1122年与Sybil Elizabeth在英国英格兰素可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1169年在法国諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯艾斯特雷-拉-坎帕格享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cheyne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (northeastern Scotland and Shetland): shortened form of   Chaney  , of Norman origin.

variants.name: Chaney
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any one of several places in Normandy, Picardy, or Artois (France) named (Le) Quesnay or Quesnoy, or elsewhere in northern France named (Le or La) Chesnay or Chesnoy. The placenames all derive from Old French chesnai or its Normanno-Picard equivalent quesnai ‘oak grove’ (medieval Latin casnetum).
French: variant of Chanet, a habitational name from any of various places called Chanet or Le Chanet, from Latin canna ‘reed’ + the suffix -etum denoting an inhabitant.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John de Caisneto Cheyne was born about 1095, in Sussex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II, was 28 and his mother, Aeliz de Maminot, was 21. He married Sybil Elizabeth in 1122, in Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1169, in Estrées-la-Campagne, Calvados, Normandy, France, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Caisneto Cheyne est né environ 1095, à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Aeliz de Maminot, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Sybil Elizabeth en 1122, à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1169, à Estrées-la-Campagne, Calvados, Normandie, France, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Caisneto Cheyne um 1095 in Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II 28 und seine Mutter Aeliz de Maminot 21. Er hat 1122 in Sussex, England, United Kingdom Sybil Elizabeth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1169 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Estrées-la-Campagne, Calvados, Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Caisneto Cheyne è nato il circa 1095 nel Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Aeliz de Maminot, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Sybil Elizabeth nel 1122, nel Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1169, nel Estrées-la-Campagne, Calvados, Normandie, Francia, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Caisneto Cheyneが約1095年にイギリスイギリススセックスで生まれた時，父Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne IIは28歳，母Aeliz de Maminotは21歳であった。1122年にイギリスイギリススセックスでSybil Elizabethと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1169年にフランスノーマンディカルヴァドスエストルeエス-ラ-カンプアグンで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Caisneto Cheyne(이)가 대략 1095년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Aeliz de Maminot(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1122년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에서 Sybil Elizabeth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1169년 프랑스 노먼디 캘바도스 에스트e스-라-캠파그니에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Caisneto Cheyne nasceu aproximadamente 1095, em Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Aeliz de Maminot, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Sybil Elizabeth em 1122, em Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1169, em Estrées-la-Campagne, Calvados, Normandie, França, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Caisneto Cheyne родился около 1095 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Aeliz de Maminot, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Sybil Elizabeth в 1122 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1169 г. в местности эстрeес-ла-кампагн, калвадос, норманди, Франция в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Caisneto Cheyne nació aproximadamente 1095, en Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Aeliz de Maminot, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Sybil Elizabeth en 1122, en Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1169, en Estrées-la-Campagne, Calvados, Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 75 años.
